Ask a marketer | chatGPT for marketing
MTYSK's ask a marketer is an Ai tool for marketing, from writing tweets, to providing strategy, its a partner for all things growth.

MTYSK Ask a marketer is an extension that helps business owners and professionals leverage Ai and ChatGPT to grow their businesses fast. 

Use Ask a marketer for daily marketing help, from writing tweets and LinkedIn posts to generating emails to potential clients, the possibilities are endless. 

With Ask a marketer, you can 10x your marketing efforts to grow your business from the ground up without spending thousands of dollars on a growth expert. Ask a marketer is like having a growth hacker right in your browser.

About MTYSK's Ask a Marketer:
🆓 100% free to use
🤖 Utilizes the same technology as ChatGPT
🚀 Trained on growth, so all tips are focused on helping your business growth

How it works:
1. Open the extension
2. Ask it a question (from tips and tricks to writing content)
3. Get answers in real-time from a trained marketing Ai 


Things you can use Ask a Marketer for:
- Get timely advice about growth marketing
- Write a sales email for a new product line
- Write tweets and LinkedIn posts that are engaging for your business
- Help write blog posts
- Anything that to help you with your marketing efforts

Add the MTYSK's Ask a Marketer extension and grow your business with Ai.

Navigate safely! Identify bookmarked sites at a glance with TrustedSite Spotlight.

Spot the sites you trust instantly! TrustedSite Spotlight shows you at a glance whether the page you're on is one you've bookmarked before.
  
Phishing and lookalike sites are hard to catch in the moment. TrustedSite Spotlight adds a quiet, always-on visual cue so you can tell a familiar, bookmarked site from an unknown one before you type a password or enter your details.

A thin colored bar at the top of every page and a matching toolbar icon tells you instantly:
 - ✅ Trusted: you've bookmarked this site before
 - ⚠️  Unknown: you haven't, so take a second look

🔒 Why TrustedSite Spotlight?
⭐️ Guards against phishing & scams: Lookalike domains stand out when they don't match a site you've already trusted.
⭐️ 100% private, 100% local: Everything runs on your device. No accounts, no tracking, no data collected or sent. Ever.
⭐️ Always visible, never in the way: A subtle signal on every page, using bookmarking habits you already have. No setup, no learning curve.
⭐️ Make it yours: Customize the bar's colors and thickness, or turn the signal off independently for trusted and unknown sites.

Stop guessing whether you've been to a site before. Let your own bookmarks do the work and browse with a little more confidence.

---
Disclaimer

TrustedSite Spotlight provides an additional layer of reassurance by identifying sites you've previously bookmarked. It is not a definitive verification that a website is safe. A bookmarked site is not guaranteed to be secure, and an unknown site is not necessarily dangerous. Use TrustedSite Spotlight alongside other security measures and always exercise caution online. The developer is not responsible for any mismatch in safety indication. Stay vigilant and browse safely.

Google Bookmarks on steroids, takes HTML snapshots of bookmarked pages and allows content search using Google's Gemini Pro AI

Bookmarks AI: Revolutionizing Web Browsing with AI-Powered Insights

PS: this extension requires havinga Gemini Pro API Key, get yours from here: https://makersuite.google.com/app/apikey

Experience the future of web browsing with Bookmarks AI, a cutting-edge Chrome extension powered by Google's advanced Gemini Pro API. Bookmarks AI goes beyond traditional summarization, offering a dynamic and intelligent way to interact with your bookmarked content.


AI-Driven Content Analysis: Utilize the power of AI to delve into your bookmarked web pages. Powered by Google's Gemini Pro API, Bookmarks AI offers a unique browsing experience that understands and interacts with web content intelligently.

Customizable Prompts for Enhanced Understanding: Have specific questions or needs? Input your custom prompts to direct the AI's focus. Whether you're seeking a summary, a detailed analysis, or specific information, Bookmarks AI adapts to your inquiries, providing tailored insights.

Flexible Content Processing: Choose how you want the AI to handle your content. Analyze pages individually for specific insights, or combine multiple pages for a comprehensive understanding. Use it to compare content, generate related works, or synthesize information across various sources.

Adherence to Criteria: Set your criteria and let Bookmarks AI evaluate whether the content of your pages meets these standards. Perfect for research, academic studies, or personal information management.

Limitless Possibilities: From summarizing lengthy articles to extracting key points, comparing content, or even checking for specific criteria - your imagination sets the boundaries.

Why Bookmarks AI?

In an era where information overload is common, Bookmarks AI serves as your intelligent companion in the digital world. It's not just a tool; it's a glimpse into the next generation of web browsers where AI enhances every aspect of your web experience. Whether you're a researcher, student, professional, or just an avid reader, Bookmarks AI is designed to optimize your browsing, enhance productivity, and transform the way you interact with online content.

Get Started with Bookmarks AI

Enhance your browsing experience today. Install Bookmarks AI and step into a world where artificial intelligence meets web browsing, redefining the limits of what's possible in content interaction and analysis.

Your Digital Fortress for Public Browsing

In today's connected world, your digital safety shouldn't be compromised just because you're using a shared computer. SecureSession is your personal digital fortress, transforming any public PC into a secure, private browsing environment with just one click. Whether you're at a library, internet cafe, hotel business center, or any shared space, SecureSession ensures your online activities remain confidential and protected.
Key Features:
🛡️ Instant Armor: Activate a fully secure browsing environment in seconds.
🕵️ Trace Eraser: Automatically wipes all your data when you're done.
⏱️ Time Guardian: Set session durations to match your needs.
🔒 File Fortress: View and manage documents without leaving traces on public PCs.
🌐 SafeNet: Browse with enhanced security protocols.
Whether you're a student researching at the library, a professional checking emails at a business center, or simply someone who values privacy while using shared computers, SecureSession provides peace of mind with every click.
Download SecureSession today and turn any public computer into your personal, secure workspace!

Perfect for:
⦿ Students using campus computers
⦿ Professionals on-the-go
⦿ Library patrons
⦿ Internet cafe visitors
⦿ Anyone using shared or public computers

SecureSession: Your bubble of security in a public digital world.
Disclaimer:
Important: SecureSession is designed to enhance your privacy and security while using public computers, but it is not a complete anonymity solution. While we clear your browsing data from the local machine, your internet service provider, websites you visit, and potential network observers may still be able to track your online activities.

SecureSession does not make you anonymous online, nor does it encrypt your internet connection. For full anonymity and encryption, consider using a VPN in addition to SecureSession.
We strive to provide the highest level of security, but we cannot guarantee complete protection against all potential threats. Users are responsible for their online activities and should always exercise caution when accessing sensitive information on public networks.

Track and analyze your browser tab lifecycle with visual charts

TabLogger tracks every tab you open, showing you exactly how you browse. See real-time stats, explore your tab history, and discover your browsing patterns—all with zero data leaving your device.

WHAT YOU GET

Live Dashboard
- Today's stats at a glance: tabs opened, closed, and currently active
- Average tab lifespan with day-over-day trends
- Activity heatmap: visualize browsing patterns by hour or day across the week
- Domain distribution chart: pie chart of top 10 visited domains (current/24h/7d/30d views)
- Interactive charts for most visited URLs (weekly/monthly/quarterly/yearly views)
- Top 10 longest-living active tabs
- One-click bookmark creation for long-living tabs

Smart Popup
- See all open tabs organized by window (main/background)
- Quick search to find any tab instantly (by title or URL)
- Display tab open duration and memory usage (if available)
- One-click tab switching or activation
- Close tabs directly from the popup
- Easy navigation to Dashboard, History, and Settings

Full History
- Complete log of every closed tab with all metadata
- Real-time search by title or URL
- Time filters: All Time, Today, This Week, This Month
- Sort by: Most Recent, Oldest, Longest Duration, Shortest Duration
- Batch select and delete operations
- Flexible pagination: 20/50/100/200 items per page
- Export filtered results or entire history

Export Your Data
- CSV format for Excel/Google Sheets
- JSON format for developers
- Export filtered results or full history

Your Data, Your Rules
- Auto-cleanup policies: 7, 30, 90 days, or keep forever
- Real-time storage usage monitor (used/quota percentage)
- Language selection: Switch between 5 languages
- Export options: CSV or JSON with one click
- One-click data reset with confirmation
- 100% local storage—nothing leaves your browser

5 Languages Supported
English, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Korean, Japanese

PRIVACY FIRST

- All data stored locally on your device
- No accounts, no sign-ups, no tracking
- No external servers or analytics
- Minimal permissions: only "tabs", "storage", and "bookmarks"

WHO IS THIS FOR?

- Tab hoarders curious about their habits
- Productivity seekers wanting to understand browsing patterns
- Researchers tracking browsing sessions
- Developers debugging tab behavior
- Anyone who wants insights into their tab usage

KEY FEATURES

1. Real-Time Dashboard - Live stats, activity heatmap, domain distribution, and interactive charts
2. Activity Heatmap - Visualize browsing patterns across time
3. Domain Distribution - Pie chart showing top 10 visited domains
4. Tab History - Search, filter, sort with flexible pagination
5. Bookmark Integration - Convert long-living tabs to bookmarks
6. Data Export - CSV or JSON, anytime
7. 100% Private - All data stays on your device
8. 5 Languages - EN, ZH-CN, ZH-TW, KO, JA

PERMISSIONS EXPLAINED

Tabs Permission
We use the "tabs" permission to track tab lifecycle events (open, close, update, activate) in real-time. This is the core functionality of TabLogger—monitoring when tabs are created, closed, or switched to provide you with accurate browsing statistics and history. No tab content is accessed, only metadata like URL, title, and timestamps.

Storage Permission
The "storage" permission allows us to save your tab history and settings locally on your device using Chrome's sync storage API. All data stays on your device and is never transmitted to external servers. This enables features like browsing history, statistics persistence, and user preferences (language, data retention policies, etc.).

Bookmarks Permission
We use the "bookmarks" permission to let you convert long-living active tabs into bookmarks with one click. This optional feature helps you preserve important tabs you've kept open for extended periods. The extension only creates bookmarks when you explicitly click the bookmark button—it never reads or modifies your existing bookmarks.

PRIVACY CERTIFICATION

TabLogger is 100% privacy-focused:
- All data stored locally using Chrome's storage API
- No external servers, no analytics, no tracking
- No user accounts or authentication required
- No data collection or sharing with third parties
- Open source and auditable
Periodic, gentle tab reviews — not silent auto-closing. Track tab activity, group by topic, declutter on your terms.

✨ New in v0.3: Close duplicate tabs in one click. The popup now finds duplicate URLs across all your windows and closes the extras, keeping the most recently used copy of each. Pinned, audible, and active tabs are never touched. Free.

You open Chrome. There are 87 tabs. You can't close any of them — what if you need that one?

Tab Hygiene keeps your tabs from turning into a graveyard. Once a week, it shows you a calm review of tabs you've forgotten — grouped by topic — and lets you decide what to keep, close (saved to a searchable archive), or save as a Chrome bookmark. Nothing closes without your OK.

Three quick utilities for everyday cleanup, all free:
• Close duplicate tabs — one click, all windows.
• Group all tabs by topic — Dev, Communication, Docs, Video, Social, AI, and more.
• Shrink to N tabs — close the oldest in your current window until only N remain.

Available in English, Español, Русский, and Deutsch.

For power users, Pro adds an extended mode that helps you push back against tab clutter more actively — custom rules, background auto-close, full searchable archive (up to 500 000 closed tabs), bulk restore / bookmark / forget, advanced search ranges.

It might sound scary at first. In practice, it just works.

100% local. No tracking. No accounts. No permissions on the sites you visit.

Free + Pro $19 lifetime, with a 14-day free trial.

订阅您的书签文件夹，并在设定的订阅时间随机向您推送书签，提醒您阅读未读书签！

Read on does not collect, store, or share any personal information from users. All data processed by this extension is not transmitted to any external servers or third parties.
---
Read on 不会收集、存储或共享任何用户的个人信息。该扩展处理的所有数据均不会传输到任何外部服务器或第三方。

- Subscribe to multiple bookmark folders
- Push bookmarks regularly
- Push multiple bookmark messages at once
- Save push history
---
- 订阅多个书签文件夹
- 定期推送书签
- 一次推送多个书签消息
- 保存推送历史

GitHub: https://github.com/Heroor/read-on
